rules.operator_action: Inspect worker health, dependency cooldowns, and interactive backlog.
Defer background work and verify customer-response SLO risk.
Measure sustained queue age before changing the reviewed concurrency limit.

rules.condition: gemma_blocked_until IS NOT NULL OR ghl_blocked_until IS NOT NULL
rules.operator_action: Honor the cooldown; do not bypass provider/model retry guidance.
Keep automation bounded, investigate, then use controlled replay only after correction.
Block new provider actions and require human reconciliation; never blind retry.
